title: montanoa tomentosa var. microcephala
intro: Montanoa tomentosa var. microcephala, also known as the tree daisy or Montanoa, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and inflammation, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Montanoa tomentosa var. microcephala include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Montanoa tomentosa var. microcephala can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
